name: 场景化生活图

defaults.setting: modern living space, clean and organized
defaults.composition: rule of thirds, product as focal point

overrides.setting: bright room with sunlight streaming through window
overrides.lighting: soft morning golden light, visible dust particles

overrides.setting: warm cozy interior, soft textiles, candles
overrides.lighting: warm ambient lighting, soft golden tones

overrides.setting: luxury spa/hotel, marble and gold fixtures

category_tips.beauty: bathroom vanity with botanical elements, skincare ritual feel
category_tips.electronics: modern desk setup, minimal aesthetic, tech-forward
category_tips.food: kitchen counter or dining table, fresh ingredients, warm tones
category_tips.fashion: urban street or boutique fitting room, model wearing the item
category_tips.home: styled room interior, product naturally placed

examples: {product} naturally placed in {scene}, morning sunlight through window, botanical touches, warm atmosphere, professional lifestyle photography, 8K
